observation.command:
printf '--- input sample ---
'; sed -n '1,80p' /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task0/functional-3/056_short_circuit.sysu.c/output.txt 2>/dev/null || find /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task0 -path '*056_short_circuit*' -type f -maxdepth 5 -print -exec sed -n '1,80p' {} \;; printf '
--- answer token names unique ---
'; awk '{print $1}' /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/*/*/answer.txt | sort | uniq -c | sort -nr; printf '
--- token examples complex ---
'; for f in /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/functional-1/023_op_priority1.sysu.c/answer.txt /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/functional-3/056_short_circuit.sysu.c/answer.txt /workspace/YatCC/build/test/task1/mini-performance/bitset.sysu.c/answer.txt; do echo ===$f===; sed -n '1,160p' $f; done
